subject: English
skill: Informative Writing With Facts, Definitions, and Details

lesson.story_mission: Join the Informative Expedition studio and help fifth graders build polished English work.
lesson.objective: I can use informative writing with facts, definitions, and details in clear grade-level reading and writing tasks.
lesson.concept_explanation: Informative Writing With Facts, Definitions, and Details is easier when you read the prompt, study the model, try a careful answer, and revise with a checklist.
lesson.mini_lesson: Use the prompt as a checklist. Name the skill move, check each part, and revise one thing before submitting.
lesson.common_misconception: A learner may answer too quickly and leave out a required part of the writing or language task.
lesson.real_world_connection: These skills help in science reports, history projects, stories, emails, presentations, and book discussions.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read the task, use the model, answer completely, and revise for conventions.
